title: carpinus caroliniana
intro: Carpinus caroliniana, also known as the American hornbeam or ironwood, is a deciduous tree native to Eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Carpinus caroliniana include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, due to its high content of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits of consuming Carpinus caroliniana tea or extracts include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The herbal preparations of Carpinus caroliniana include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it.
